<!-- Generated by docs/research/benchmarks/gen_fragments.py from
docs/research/benchmarks/data/*.json — do not edit by hand. Re-run

One static Go binary checks 827 Markdown files in about
0.2 s. That is roughly 26x faster than Node markdownlint.
It does more per file than the Rust linters; closing
the gap to the fastest of them is active work.
